description: Low-power sub-1 GHz RF transceiver for ISM/SRD bands, SPI interface

Not used

fields.name: GDO_DS
fields.description: Set high (1) or low (0) output drive strength on the GDO pins

fields.description: Invert output, i.e. select active low (1) / high (0)

fields.name: GDO1_CFG
fields.description: Default is 3-state (See Table 41 on page 62)

fields.name: TEMP_SENSOR_ENABLE
fields.description: Enable analog temperature sensor. Write 128 (0x80) to enable. Write 0 in all other register bits when using temperature sensor

fields.name: GDO0_INV
fields.description: Invert output, i.e. select active low (1) / high (0). IOCFGx_GDOx_INV

fields.name: GDO0_CFG
fields.description: GDO0 configuration. Default is 135-141 kHz clock output (XOSC frequency divided by 192). See Table 41. Change by writing to IOCFG0.GDO0_CFG

FIFO Control.name: FIFOTHR
FIFO Control.description: RX FIFO and TX FIFO thresholds

fields.name: RSVD_7
fields.description: Reserved, write 0 for compatibility with possible future extensions

fields.name: ADC_RETENTION
fields.description: 0: TEST1 = 0x31 and TEST2= 0x88 when waking up from SLEEP 1: TEST1 = 0x35 and TEST2 = 0x81 when waking up from SLEEP

fields.name: CLOSE_IN_RX
fields.description: FIFOTHR.CLOSE_IN_RX=0. See more in DN010 [8]

fields.name: FIFO_THR
fields.description: Set the threshold for the TX FIFO and RX FIFO. The threshold is exceeded when the number of bytes in the FIFO is equal to or higher than

fields.name: PKTLEN
fields.description: Packet Length

fields.name: RSVD_4
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: PQT
fields.description: Preamble quality estimator threshold. The preamble quality estimator increases an internal counter by one each time a bit is received that is different from the previous bit, and decreases the counter by 8 each time a bit is received that is the same as the last bit. A threshold of 4∙ PQT for this counter is used to gate sync word detection.

fields.name: CRC_AUTOFLUSH
fields.description: Enable automatic flush of RX FIFO when CRC is not OK. This requires that only one packet is in the RXIFIFO and that packet length is limited to the RX FIFO size.

fields.name: APPEND_STATUS
fields.description: When enabled, two status bytes will be appended to the payload of the packet. The status bytes contain RSSI and LQI values, as well as CRC OK.

fields.name: ADR_CHK
fields.description: Controls address check configuration of received packages. Setting PKTCTRL1.ADR_CHK to any other value than zero enables the packet address filter. The packet handler engine will compare the destination address byte in the packet with the programmed node address in the ADDR register and the 0x00 broadcast address when PKTCTRL1.ADR_CHK=10 or both the 0x00 and 0xFF broadcast addresses when PKTCTRL1.ADR_CHK=11.

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Not used

fields.name: RSVD_3
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: WHITE_DATA
fields.description: Turn data whitening on / off. By setting PKTCTRL0.WHITE_DATA=1, all data, except the preamble and the sync word will be XOR-ed with a 9-bit pseudo-random (PN9) sequence before being transmitted.

fields.name: PKT_FORMAT
fields.description: Format of RX and TX data

fields.name: CRC_EN
fields.description: 1: CRC calculation in TX and CRC check in RX enabled

fields.name: LENGTH_CONFIG
fields.description: Configure the packet length

fields.name: FREQ_IF

fields.description: Frequency Synthesizer Control

fields.name: FREQ
fields.description: FREQ[23:22] is always 0 (the FREQ2 register is less than 36 with 26-27 MHz crystal). FREQ[23:0] is the base frequency for the frequency synthesiser in increments of f_XOSC /2^16. by the 24 bit frequency word located in the FREQ2, FREQ1, and FREQ0 registers.

fields.name: RX_TIME_QUAL
fields.description: When the RX_TIME timer expires, the chip checks if sync word is found when RX_TIME_QUAL=0 , or either sync word is found or PQI is set when RX_TIME_QUAL=1.

fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: FOC_BS_CS_GATE
fields.description: If the FOCCFG.FOC_BS_CS_GATE bit is set, the offset compensator will freeze until carrier sense asserts.

fields.name: FOC_PRE_K
fields.description: FOCCFG.FOC_PRE_K sets the gain before the sync word is detected.

fields.name: FOC_POST_K
fields.description: FOCCFG.FOC_POST_K selects the gain after the sync word has been found.

fields.name: FOC_LIMIT
fields.description: The tracking range of the algorithm is selectable as fractions of the channel bandwidth with the FOCCFG.FOC_LIMIT configuration register.

fields.name: BS_PRE_KI
fields.description: The clock recovery feedback loop integral gain to be used before a sync word is detected (used to correct offsets in data rate)

fields.name: BS_PRE_KP
fields.description: The clock recovery feedback loop proportional gain to be used before a sync word is detected.

fields.name: BS_POST_KI
fields.description: The clock recovery feedback loop integral gain to be used after a sync word is detected.

fields.name: BS_POST_KP
fields.description: The clock recovery feedback loop proportional gain to be used after a sync word is detected.

fields.name: MAX_DVGA_GAIN

fields.name: RSVD_1
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: CRC_OK
fields.description: R The last CRC comparison matched. Cleared when entering/restarting RX mode.

fields.name: CS
fields.description: R Carrier sense. Cleared when entering IDLE mode.

fields.name: PQT_REACHED
fields.description: R Preamble Quality reached. If leaving RX state when this bit is set it will remain asserted until the chip re-enters RX state ( MARCSTATE=0x0D ). The bit will also be cleared if PQI goes below the programmed PQT value.

fields.name: CCA
fields.description: R Channel is clear

fields.name: SFD
fields.description: R Start of Frame Delimiter. In RX, this bit is asserted when sync word has been received and de-asserted at the end of the packet. It will also de- assert when a packet is discarded due to address or maximum length filtering or the radio enters RXFIFO_OVERFLOW state. In TX this bit will always read as 0.

fields.name: GDO2
fields.description: R Current GDO2 value. Note: the reading gives the non-inverted value irrespective of what IOCFG2.GDO2_INV is programmed to. It is not recommended to check for PLL lock by reading PKTSTATUS[2] with GDO2_CFG=0x0A .

fields.name: GDO0
fields.description: R Current GDO0 value. Note: the reading gives the non-inverted value irrespective of what IOCFG0.GDO0_INV is programmed to. It is not recommended to check for PLL lock by reading PKTSTATUS[0] with GDO0_CFG=0x0A .
